Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models

Your browser does not support the audio element. Listen to article This content is generated by Google AI. Generative AI is experimental [[duration]] minutes Voice Speed 0.75X 1X 1.5X 2X

Today, we are introducing Gemma 4, a new generation of open models built for advanced reasoning, agentic workflows, and deployment on hardware that teams already control.

DeepMind positions the release as a bridge between frontier research and practical product work, with an emphasis on smaller footprints, multimodal support, and easier integration into existing developer stacks.

The company also argues that open deployment paths matter because enterprises increasingly want to evaluate model quality, latency, and governance requirements together rather than as separate decisions.

Open model performance chart
